location: Purchased for 5,500 runes from the Hermit Merchant, who only appears at night, at Hermit Merchant's Shack in Capital Outskirts.
tactics: From the Outer Wall Battleground grace, head northeast and up the cliff to reach the shack; there's a grace right at the shack itself.
The Hermit Merchant only sets up shop at night — if he's not there, rest at a nearby grace to skip to nightfall.
lore: An ornately decorated greatshield favored by the scions of great noble houses — some say its oversized bulk was less about protection and more a way for cowards to avoid ever earning a scar in battle.

builds.name: Full-block Strength tank
builds.why: Straightforward 100% physical negation greatshield with no gimmicks, good as a reliable purchase-only pick for a pure Strength build.
